titles.title: I Keep Falling in Love with Him (2)

verse.name: v1
v2
verse.lines: He gets sweeter and sweeter as the days go by, Oh, what a love between my Lord and I, I keep falling in love with Him; Over and over and over and over again.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When I first fell in love with Jesus, I have Him all my heart. I didn't think I could love Him no more, Than I did right at the start. When I look back over the mountains, And the valleys where we've been. It let's me know I could love Him so Much more than I did then.

verse.name: v4
